plugins.name: extract-figma-design-md
plugins.description: Generate a spec-compliant DESIGN.md design-system file from any Figma design system, via the Figma MCP.

plugins.name: write-project-summary
plugins.description: Write a portfolio project summary — a single-page writeup of a shipped or in-progress product — with interview and drafting modes and a fabrication guard.

plugins.name: critique-from-a-boring-designer
plugins.description: Give a product designer a structured critique of a screen or flow — gated by design stage, traced to stated principles, naming problems precisely without ever proposing an alternative design.
